name: Alu Gosht Kari (Meat and Potato Curry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into cubes.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet or pot and fry mustard seeds until they begin to crackle.
3. Add fenugreek, garlic, ginger, and onions; stir-fry until onions are golden brown.
4. Stir in turmeric and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add coriander, cumin, and chili powder; stir well.
6. Add salt and vinegar; cook until the liquid evaporates.
7. Sprinkle garam masala over the mixture and stir to combine.
8. Add the meat cubes and turn them to coat evenly with the spices.
9. Pour in extra vinegar if the spices start to stick together.
10. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 1.5 to 2 hours.
11. Add the cubed potatoes and continue cooking, covered, for an additional 20-30 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
12. Garnish with fresh coriander before serving.
